clientConfigFields.label: Tenant
clientConfigFields.description: The Microsoft identity platform tenant segment to use, such as common, organizations, consumers, or a specific tenant ID.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Omit it to use the authenticated user's default OneDrive.

parentPath.description: Path from the drive root, starting with /.

conflictBehavior.description: Conflict behavior used when a folder with the same name already exists.

webUrl.description: Web URL for the drive item.

description.description: User-visible description for the drive item.

cTag.description: Content tag for the drive item.

eTag.description: Entity tag for the drive item.

size.description: Size of the drive item in bytes.

createdDateTime.description: Creation timestamp for the drive item.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Last modification timestamp for the drive item.

user.description: Identity information returned by Microsoft Graph.

application.description: Identity information returned by Microsoft Graph.

device.description: Identity information returned by Microsoft Graph.

createdBy.description: Identity set returned by Microsoft Graph.

user.description: Identity information returned by Microsoft Graph.

application.description: Identity information returned by Microsoft Graph.

device.description: Identity information returned by Microsoft Graph.

lastModifiedBy.description: Identity set returned by Microsoft Graph.

driveId.description: Drive ID of the referenced item.

id.description: Drive item ID of the referenced item.

path.description: Percent-encoded path of the referenced item.

driveType.description: Drive type of the referenced item.

siteId.description: Site ID of the referenced item.

mimeType.description: Detected MIME type for the file.

hashes.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

file.description: File facet for a drive item.

view.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

folder.description: Folder facet for a drive item.

root.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

deleted.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

fileSystemInfo.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

remoteItem.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

shared.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

specialFolder.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

searchResult.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

actions.name: delete_item
actions.description: Delete a drive item from OneDrive and move it to the recycle bin.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Omit it to use the authenticated user's default OneDrive.

ifMatch.description: Optional eTag used for conditional delete requests.

deleted.description: Whether the drive item was deleted successfully.

actions.name: download_file
actions.description: Download one file from OneDrive by item ID and return its content encoded as base64.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Omit it to use the authenticated user's default OneDrive.

format.description: Optional format to convert the file into before download.

fileName.description: Optional file name to use for the downloaded file.

ifNoneMatch.description: Optional eTag or cTag used for conditional download requests.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded file.

contentBase64.description: The downloaded file content encoded as base64.

notModified.description: Whether the OneDrive server returned HTTP 304 Not Modified.

actions.name: download_file_by_path
actions.description: Download one file from OneDrive by path and return its content encoded as base64.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Omit it to use the authenticated user's default OneDrive.

itemPath.description: Path to a drive item relative to the drive root. A leading slash is optional.

fileName.description: Optional file name to use for the downloaded file.

ifNoneMatch.description: Optional eTag or cTag used for conditional download requests.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded file.

contentBase64.description: The downloaded file content encoded as base64.

notModified.description: Whether the OneDrive server returned HTTP 304 Not Modified.

actions.name: download_item_as_format
actions.description: Download one drive item after converting it to a supported Microsoft Graph format.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Omit it to use the authenticated user's default OneDrive.

format.description: Format to convert the drive item into.

pathAndFilename.description: Path to a drive item relative to the drive root. A leading slash is optional.

fileName.description: Optional file name to use for the downloaded file.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded file.

contentBase64.description: The downloaded file content encoded as base64.

notModified.description: Whether the OneDrive server returned HTTP 304 Not Modified.

actions.name: get_drive
actions.description: Get metadata for the current drive or a specific drive.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Omit it to use the authenticated user's default OneDrive.

select.description: Optional Microsoft Graph fields to include in the response.

quota.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

actions.name: get_item
actions.description: Get metadata for a drive item by item ID or path.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Omit it to use the authenticated user's default OneDrive.

itemPath.description: Path from the drive root, starting with /.

select.description: Optional Microsoft Graph fields to include in the response.

expand.description: Optional Microsoft Graph relationships to expand in the response.

webUrl.description: Web URL for the drive item.

description.description: User-visible description for the drive item.

cTag.description: Content tag for the drive item.

eTag.description: Entity tag for the drive item.

size.description: Size of the drive item in bytes.

createdDateTime.description: Creation timestamp for the drive item.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Last modification timestamp for the drive item.

actions.name: list_folder_children
actions.description: List the direct children of a folder in OneDrive.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Omit it to use the authenticated user's default OneDrive.

folderPath.description: Path from the drive root, starting with /.

top.description: Maximum number of items to return.

expand.description: Optional Microsoft Graph relationships to expand in the response.

nextLink.description: Opaque Microsoft Graph nextLink returned by a previous OneDrive response.

actions.name: search_items
actions.description: Search OneDrive for files and folders by keyword.

query.description: Keyword query used to search the current drive.

top.description: Maximum number of items to return.

actions.name: update_file_content
actions.description: Replace the content of one existing OneDrive file.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Omit it to use the authenticated user's default OneDrive.

fileId.description: The transit file identifier returned by POST /api/files.

name.description: Optional filename override to send to the provider.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type override to send to the provider.

contentBase64.description: Base64-encoded file content used for inline uploads.

text.description: Plain-text file content used for inline uploads.

name.description: File name used for inline upload content.

mimeType.description: MIME type used for inline upload content.

deferCommit.description: Unsupported for now. Uploads are always committed immediately.

ifMatch.description: Optional eTag used for conditional upload session creation.

ifNoneMatch.description: Optional eTag used to prevent updates when the item has not changed.

fileSize.description: Optional file size hint used by Microsoft Graph for quota checks.

conflictBehavior.description: Conflict behavior used when the updated content collides during commit.

driveItemSource.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

mediaSource.description: A generic JSON object returned by Microsoft Graph.

actions.name: upload_file
actions.description: Upload one file to OneDrive, optionally creating destination folders on the way.

driveId.description: Optional drive ID. Omit it to use the authenticated user's default OneDrive.

folder.description: Destination folder path starting with /, or a parent folder item ID.

name.description: File name used for inline upload content.

mimeType.description: MIME type used for inline upload content.

fileId.description: The transit file identifier returned by POST /api/files.

name.description: Optional filename override to send to the provider.

contentBase64.description: Base64-encoded file content used for inline uploads.

deferCommit.description: Unsupported for now. Uploads are always committed immediately.

ifMatch.description: Optional eTag used for conditional upload session creation.

conflictBehavior.description: Conflict behavior used when a file with the same name already exists.
